scope: ACL 2027 supplement material decision-map iteration and S4 red-material recheck

diagnosis.user_report: The user noticed a Figure S4 caption that framed red material in selected VLM grounding cases as diagnostic evidence.
diagnosis.root_cause_status: The current source and rebuilt PDF no longer use that old caption or legacy figure. The old figure remains registered as historical/generated material but is excluded from the ACL supplement and shared experiments section.

pdf_text_scan.command: pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Post-repair GRScenes target-view render panel|Material safe-conversion decision map|Red material|Selected VLM grounding cases|registered diagnostic figure|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs|zhuzihou|jandan138|github.com|ConvertAsset.git" -S || true
positive_hits: Figure S4: Post-repair GRScenes target-view render panel for the VLM evidence chain.
Figure S11: Material safe-conversion decision map.

s4-08.png.verdict: PASS: current S4 is the post-repair clean rerender panel with green target boxes and no red material fallback.

s4-09.png.verdict: PASS: material baseline page has no saturated red fallback signal.

material-25.png.verdict: PASS_WITH_CAVEAT: the decision map is organized and unclipped; some in-figure microcopy is small at full-page scale.

material-26.png.verdict: PASS: the former orphan text page is gone; page 26 now begins the InternNav supplement.

local_visual_review.notes: The material decision map replaces two sparse table/prose pages with one render-supported policy figure. The isolated follow-up prose was removed because it created an almost blank page; the same claim boundary remains in the caption and registered shared tables.
